4.2.1Frontmatter4.2.2Themes4.2.3Layouts
4.3Directives

Configuration

Marque configuration is split between site defaults (marque.toml) and per-page frontmatter.

Site defaults (marque.toml)

toml
title = Marque
description = Built with Marque
layout = topnav
theme = default
width = 82

Page overrides (frontmatter)

yaml
---
title: Showcase
nav: showcase
layout: topnav
theme: pycorino
width: wide
---

Precedence

  1. Frontmatter values override marque.toml per page.
  2. Missing frontmatter keys fall back to global config.

Key fields

  • title: page title text.
  • nav: output slug (*.html) and routing identity.
  • layout: page layout override.
  • theme: page theme override.
  • width: page width override.

Ordering/navigation labels come from summary.mq.

Renaming nav changes the output filename. Keep slugs stable for external links.

Built with Marque
